name: Xstrata Nickel
description: Xstrata Nickel was a major division of the Anglo-Swiss multinational mining company Xstrata plc, which was headquartered in Zug, Switzerland, with its registered office in London, United Kingdom. The company focused on the exploration, mining, and production of nickel, operating significant assets globally, including the Falconbridge operations in Canada. Xstrata Nickel played a critical role in the global supply of nickel before the entire Xstrata group was acquired by Glencore in 2013, leading to the integration of its assets into the broader Glencore portfolio.
